data.body:
## Description

TDD RED phase — write failing tests BEFORE v2 path exemptions are removed from hook passthroughs. These tests verify the guards are updated to use v3 paths.

## What to implement

Add tests to verify current v2 exemptions are removed:

1. test_cascade_breaker_no_tickets_v2_passthrough (tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh): inject a .tickets/ path as FILE_PATH in hook input with cascade counter >= 5. Assert hook BLOCKS (exit 2). Currently exits 0 due to case passthrough on .tickets/.

2. test_review_stop_check_no_tickets_v2_exclusion (tests/hooks/test-review-stop-check.sh or similar): set up a changed file under .tickets/ path, run hook. Assert the file appears in TOTAL_CHANGED. Currently grep -v exclusion hides it.

3. test_title_length_validator_v3_path_guarded (tests/hooks/test-title-length-validator.sh): pass a file path under the v3 event-sourced path with a title exceeding 255 chars. Assert BLOCKED (exit 2). Currently exits 0 because guard pattern only matches v2 path.

## TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL (RED) before tasks 5959-b4c7 and 4d0b-13e1 apply changes.
Tests must PASS (GREEN) after those tasks.
